tools.name: top_news
tools.description: Top headlines by country and topic. Topics: business, technology, sports, health, science, entertainment.

tools.name: search_news
tools.description: Search news articles by keyword with time filter.

tools.name: trending_topics
tools.description: What is trending right now on Google in a country.

tools.name: topic_deep_dive
tools.description: Deep analysis: articles, source diversity, interest trend over time.

tools.name: compare_coverage
tools.description: How different news sources cover the same story.

tools.name: trend_over_time
tools.description: Google Trends interest over time for 1-5 keywords. Compare search interest.

tools.name: related_queries
tools.description: What people also search for around a keyword. Rising + top queries.

tools.name: breaking_now
tools.description: Latest breaking/developing stories — combines trending searches + top headlines.
